reviews.comment:
Exclente para estacion de servicios para el turista en mdp. Tienen todo tipo de insumos como aceite agua destilada lámparas etc para asistirte antes de salir a la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station for tourists in Mar del Plata. They have all kinds of supplies like oil, distilled water, lamps, etc. to help you before hitting the road.

reviews.comment:
Quiero comentarles que el encargado del taller mecánico del ACA (bajito de anteojo) atiende pésimo, mas que eso, atiende como odiando el trabajo, chatea en WhatsApp mientras ignora al cliente, contesta agresivamente; en tres oportunidades que fui, fue una peor que la otra la atención, no voy a ir nunca mas mientras ese señor trabaje allí. Una pena que gente así ensucie ese lugar, soy cliente del ACA por mas de 14 años.

(Translated by Google)
I want to tell you that the mechanic in charge at the ACA (the short guy with glasses) provides terrible service. More than that, he acts like he hates his job. He chats on WhatsApp while ignoring customers and answers aggressively. On the three occasions I went, the service was worse than the last. I will never go back as long as that man works there. It's a shame that people like that tarnish the place. I've been an ACA customer for over 14 years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNleEpmOVJnEAE
